name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express is located at 2011 Union Ave, Bakersfield, CA 93305 in the Downtown neighborhood. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 458 reviews. Call +1 661-324-2284.
description_long: ACE Cash Express is an established financial services company operating physical store locations across the United States. The company provides a range of short-term and emergency financial solutions designed for consumers who need quick access to cash or basic financial services. Their business model centers on serving underbanked and traditional banking customers through a network of retail locations. ACE's primary service offerings include installment loans, title loans (where available by state), check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, and tax preparation services. They also offer credit cards and business services. The company emphasizes fast funding and accessibility, with online loan options available for qualifying customers. The company distinguishes itself through its multi-service approach, allowing customers to handle various financial needs at a single location. ACE operates a store locator system and maintains dedicated customer service channels for general inquiries and online loan operations. They also maintain compliance programs, including California privacy notices for residents. ACE Cash Express serves a specific market segment—consumers seeking rapid access to emergency funds without traditional bank requirements. However, prospective customers should note that service availability is geographically restricted and varies significantly by state. Customers should verify service availability in their specific state before applying.
pros: Multiple service offerings (loans, check cashing, bill payments, money transfers, tax services) available at single locations
Online loan application options for qualifying customers
Same-day or rapid funding emphasized for emergency cash needs
Established national presence with store locator system
Dedicated customer service channels with toll-free numbers and email support
Title loan options available (where permitted by state)
cons: Service availability highly restricted by state—certain products unavailable in Colorado and other states
Website location pages return 404 errors, indicating potential data accuracy or service availability issues
Limited information publicly available about APR rates, fees, or loan terms on accessible website content
Typical of emergency cash lenders, likely charges significantly higher APR than traditional banks or payday alternatives
Physical store dependency may be inconvenient for some consumers despite online options
best_for: Consumers needing immediate emergency cash with same-day or next-day funding
Unbanked or underbanked individuals in need of check cashing or bill payment services
Vehicle owners seeking title-based collateral loans where available
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers in urgent need of small emergency loans or basic financial services who have access to functioning ACE locations. The primary caveat is severe geographic service limitations—verify that your specific state and services are available before applying, as the website indicates many products are not available in all states.
